Name: Mosfets
Purpose: IRLB3034PBF MOSFETs for controlling the heaters of the printer.

Name: Capacitors
Purpose: 220 uf 50V capacitors for the motherboard

Name: female headers
Purpose: For connecting the A4988 drivers to the motherboard

Name: Male pin headers
Purpose: For connecting components like endstops and the MCU to the motherboard

Name: Blower fan
Purpose: Cooling the nozzle/part

Name: Bearing
Purpose: 16x8x5 bearing for holding the top of leadscrews in place

Name: Fuse
Purpose: KCD3 Fuse holder for the motherboard. For the main PSU, 30-35A fuse. For bed PSU, 20A fuse.

Name: Screw terminals
Purpose: 30A Screw terminals for powering motherboard, and connecting heaters to motherboard

Name: Resistors
Purpose: 1/4 watt, 10k and 150 ohm resistors for the motherboard MOSFETS

Name: Capacitors
Purpose: 100 nf (0.1 uf) 50V ceramic capacitors for the motherboard

Name: Screws
Purpose: For fastening components to the the rivet nuts. 225 M5, 5 M4, 100 M3

Name: PEI sheet
Purpose: The print surface that goes on top of the print bed. 310x310

Name: Polycarbonate
Purpose: Polycarbonate sheet for the door.

Name: Heat set inserts
Purpose: Attaching electronics case lid

Name: Rivet nuts
Purpose: Nuts for fastening things to the square steel tubing. Need 175 M5, 5 M4, 100 M3

Name: MK8 extruder
Purpose: The MK8 extruder pushes filament into the hotend using the Nema 17 motor

Name: PTC heater
Purpose: The space heater for the heated chamber of the printer to enable printing harder materials. 24v 400w.

Name: Heated bed
Purpose: 300x300 24v heated bed to heat up the print surface

Name: Square steel tube
Purpose: 2mm thick 40x40 Galvanised square steel tubing is the frame for the printer. I will use 40x40 as it has greater strength. I will cut it to length, drill holes where necessary for mounting and then weld together. I will need 6m.

Name: ACM panel
Purpose: ACM panel will make the enclosure for the printer. I need to use ACM as it is the cheapest suitable material, as it must be able to contain the heat of the chamber without weakening. I will cut/bend the ACM to fit around the frame.
